targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "temperature-outdoor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Daylight lux (proxy de irradiancia, vendor no genera solar_irradiance)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "daylight-lux")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry_1h")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 24.0 / 1000.0 }))
  |> sum()
